zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionisia Denise Lovetot於1260年出生在英國肯特肯亞丁頓時，她的父親John Lovetot the Elder25歲，母親Margaret d'Eiville22歲。她於大約1280年與Sir Thomas de Normanville在英國英格蘭肯特肯亞丁頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1319年在英國英格蘭肯特肯亞丁頓享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionisia Denise Lovetot于1260年出生在英国肯特肯亞丁頓时，她的父亲John Lovetot the Elder25岁，母亲Margaret d'Eiville22岁。她于大约1280年与Sir Thomas de Normanville在英国英格兰肯特肯亞丁頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1319年在英国英格兰肯特肯亞丁頓享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lovetot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Anglo-Norman French louet ‘wolf-cub’, a diminutive of lou ‘wolf’. The nickname may also have been used as a personal name. Compare Love , Lovell , Low .
from the Middle English female personal name Luvot or Lovet, pet forms of Love .

variants.name: Lovitt
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Lovett  .

variants.name: Love
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

nameMeanings.name: Dionisia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Denise ; see Dennis . This form was in use in northern England from the 14th to the 17th century; the short form Dye is the source of the surname Dyson.

nameMeanings.name: Denise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

variants.name: Denyse
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionisia Denise Lovetot was born in 1260, in Kenardington, Kent, England, her father, John Lovetot the Elder, was 25 and her mother, Margaret d'Eiville, was 22. She married Sir Thomas de Normanville about 1280, in Kenardington, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1319, in Kenardington, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionisia Denise Lovetot est née en 1260, à Kenardington, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Lovetot the Elder, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret d'Eiville, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Normanville environ 1280, à Kenardington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1319, à Kenardington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dionisia Denise Lovetot 1260 in Kenardington, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Lovetot the Elder 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret d'Eiville 22. Sie hat um 1280 in Kenardington, Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas de Normanville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1319 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Kenardington, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionisia Denise Lovetot è nata il nel 1260 nel Kenardington, Kent, England, sua padre, John Lovetot the Elder, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret d'Eiville, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Normanville circa 1280, nel Kenardington, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1319, nel Kenardington, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dionisia Denise Lovetotが1260年にイギリスケントケナルディントンで生まれた時，父John Lovetot the Elderは25歳，母Margaret d'Eivilleは22歳であった。約1280年にイギリスイギリスケントケナルディントンでSir Thomas de Normanvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1319年にイギリスイギリスケントケナルディントンで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dionisia Denise Lovetot(이)가 1260년 영국 켄트 켄아르딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Lovetot the Elder(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret d'Eiville(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 켄아르딩턴에서 Sir Thomas de Normanville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1319년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 켄아르딩턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.ABT 1281/1282: de 8 de janeiro de 1281 a 7 de janeiro de 1283
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dionisia Denise Lovetot nasceu em 1260, em Kenardington, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Lovetot the Elder, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret d'Eiville, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Normanville aproximadamente 1280, em Kenardington, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1319, em Kenardington, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionisia Denise Lovetot родилась в 1260 г. в местности кенардингтон, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John Lovetot the Elder было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret d'Eiville, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Normanville около 1280 г. в местности кенардингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1319 г. в местности кенардингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dionisia Denise Lovetot nació en 1260, en Kenardington, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Lovetot the Elder, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret d'Eiville, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas de Normanville aproximadamente 1280, en Kenardington, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1319, en Kenardington, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
